text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho attracts the strongest
competitors, and summer camp is where everyone
hopes to achieve incredible gains in the lead-up
to it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Originally, I wasn't expecting to rise through the
ranks at all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But startin' today, it's no longer a futile struggle.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That said, there's still a limit to how much I can
improve.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm not like the new generation, with their heads
full of ambit—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: 'Sup.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Is it really okay for a sheltered little princess like
yourself to be out in this kind of heat?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, quit that, Shakur. You know I'm debuting,
don't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: With strings attached, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You know I'm an exchange student, right? I have
permission to race for three years and then I have
to return.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But I intend to enjoy the time I've been given to
the fullest. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'd be so happy if we could race each
other here at camp, Shakur. Please and thank
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she talks about her situation casually, I
wonder how it feels to know the end is coming
from the very beginning. Not only that...
choice_data_list: You two are kind of similar, huh?
You two are kind of similar, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: How so? In what way?
choice_data_list: You both seem to know your fate.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
She actually knows and fully grasps her future,
but in a completely different way than me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: She's... already accepted hers.
choice_data_list:
You mean she's purposefully not trying to
change it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Exactly.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Not like it's anything to do with me, though. At
any rate, even if you take one person out of the
equation, there's an endless amount of people to
replace them.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you take a good look around the
camp. Gathering data isn't a walk in the park so
try and pull your weight, okay?
